hero.greeting: Hello! My name is William Douglas
hero.title: Full Stack Developer and Technology Enthusiast
hero.description: I'm a developer passionate about technology and innovation. Here you can learn more about me, my work, and my projects.

about.title: Get to Know Me
about.subtitle: Feel free to explore more about my work!
about.body: I currently work as a Senior Developer at Aubay, allocated to BNP Paribas, using .NET, Angular, C#, and VB.NET as the main technologies. I have over 7 years of experience developing Mobile, Desktop, and Web solutions.
about.cta: Feel free to take a look at my full CV!

education.title: Education
education.subtitle: Here is where knowledge takes you furthest

items.description: Specialization in Software Engineering with focus on system architecture, agile methodologies, software quality, and technological project management.
Solid foundation in computing fundamentals, algorithms, data structures, software development, networks, databases and artificial intelligence.
Technical training in analog and digital electronics, electronic equipment maintenance, microcontroller programming and industrial automation.
Improvement of English fluency with focus on professional communication, technical writing and conversation for international corporate environments.
In-person English course with focus on conversation, advanced grammar and technical vocabulary for technology professionals.
